description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI/CD that runs on push to specific branches and on pull requests. The workflow consists of three jobs: sanity, build, and release. The sanity job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python and Ansible versions, checks out the repository, installs dependencies, and runs ansible-test sanity. The build job builds the Ansible collection. The release job publishes the collection to Galaxy and deploys documentation to GitHub Pages if the push is not to the develop branch.
